overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a desert highway shoulder in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), approaching a futuristic city complex built atop red rock formations. The scene features sparse desert vegetation, passing vehicles, power transmission lines, and large billboards under a clear blue sky with warm afternoon lighting.

white sedan passes by on the highway

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving past on the road

tall modern skyscrapers and buildings constructed on red rock plateau
tall metal electrical transmission towers with multiple cables

sparse dry bushes and yucca plants on roadside

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a desert highway shoulder passing a large weathered billboard with blue graffiti art on the left. Sparse desert vegetation and yucca plants line the roadside while a futuristic city complex looms on the rocky plateau to the right. Power line towers stretch into the distance on the left, and a white sedan passes by on the road around the 13-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert highway with power line corridor

events.description: dark colored sports car passes by on the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway shoulder with power lines prominent on the left and approaching the red billboard ahead

notable_agents.action: dark sports car overtaking on the road

entered.detail: large red billboard with orange graphics visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the open desert highway, the camera approaches a large red billboard ahead on the left. The power line towers are now prominent on the left side, and the futuristic city remains visible on the right. A dark sports car overtakes the camera's position around 35 seconds as the red billboard draws nearer.

events.description: light colored sedan passes by on the highway

agents.ego_description: walking past the red billboard with open road ahead toward distant industrial structures

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving past on the road

entered.detail: low-lying industrial buildings and structures visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the red billboard and continues toward distant industrial structures on the horizon. The power lines recede into the distance on the left while the futuristic city complex appears closer on the right. A light-colored sedan passes by around the 50-second mark as the road stretches ahead through the arid landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desert highway shoulder that gradually draws closer to a futuristic city complex perched on a rocky plateau. It begins by passing a weathered billboard adorned with blue graffiti and sparse yucca plants, while a white sedan glides past on the road. As the camera advances, the scene shifts toward a prominent red billboard on the left and towering power lines that stretch across the arid landscape, just as a dark sports car overtakes the viewer's position. The perspective then moves past the red billboard, allowing the distant industrial structures on the horizon to expand and the city complex on the right to loom larger. Finally, the camera continues its steady trek through the open desert as a light-colored sedan passes by, leaving the power lines to recede into the distance.
